products.title: Como Small Box
products.description: Translucent Treats. Our mesmerizing Como collection features juicy, dimensional colors, hand-poured to create a unique marbleized finish. Each piece is then polished to luminous perfection. Each box brings one-of-a-kind shine to any modern tablescape, or style them with our Como vases to create a monumental moment.

products.title: Rider Small Cabinet
products.description: Parisian Flair. Our Rider Small Cabinet is an updated take on French Empire style. Glossy black or white lacquer with antiqued brass accents and dramatic acrylic finials exude modern glamour. The leggy base makes this hardworking piece feel light and lively. products.title: Ripple Mezuzah

products.title: Jacques Round Tray

The edge every spring or summer soirée needs, they’re also an evocative touch year-round.

A clean, modernist choice with subtle, elevating detail—each shade is balanced by a tooled brass plate on its underside—our Paradiso lighting collection uses illuminating minimalist shapes to glow up your space. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Canaan Table Lamp
products.description: Monumental Modernism. Our solid marble Canaan Table Lamps create a futuristic, chic look. The rich Carrara marble and modern shape make this lamp fab in pairs anchoring an entryway console. Antiqued brass accents add a twinkly touch to an otherwise clean, modern design. All lighting sales are final.

products.description: Surreal Size. Our mushroom sculptures are crafted from solid acrylic in bold hues. We sculpt the models in our Soho pottery studio to give each piece an organic gestural form. Our oversized acrylic sculptures start their journey in our Soho pottery studio,

products.title: Sputnik Flush Mount
products.description: Modern Glamour. A groovy classic with our own twinkly twist. Plant a row of our Sputnik Flush Mounts over your bar for a chic and inviting loungey ambiance. products.title: Claridge Tiny Teardrop Table Lamp
products.description: Crystal Clear. The adorable mini-me to the Claridge Teardrop Table Lamp—meet the Claridge Tiny Teardrop Table Lamp. The Claridge Collection features lead crystal with polished nickel accents and gray cotton fabric shade. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Adderall Pill Box
products.description: A Dose of Style. We've taken our longtime love of pharmaceuticals to a new level of luxe. Cast in solid brass, then hand-polished to perfection, our hinged pill boxes are just what the decorator ordered. Each box top is laser-etched with an mg prescription. The perfect provocative touch for your tablescape or hip hideaway on your bedside table.

products.title: Claridge Teardrop Table Lamp
products.description: Crystal Clear. The Claridge Collection: lead crystal with polished nickel accents and gray cotton fabric shade. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Bellport Table Lamp
products.description: Gilded Cage. A dash of architectural rigor with a soupçon of preppy panache. Featuring caned rattan panels set in a modern brass framework, it's attention-getting on your side table or anchoring an entryway console. Topped with a white fabric shade. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Monaco Table Lamp
products.description: Future Squared. Inspired by the minimalist rigor of Donald Judd and the jet set je ne sais quoi of its namesake, our Monaco Table Lamp dazzles. Featuring a natural brass base supporting five generous chunks of turquoise or smoke crystal topped with an off-white silk shade, or a polished nickel base with clear crystal topped with a white silk shade. A little Art Deco, a little swinging 60s, and all

products.title: Giant Sputnik Chandelier
products.description: Modern Glamour. A groovy classic with our own twinkly twist. The Giant Sputnik Chandelier is perfect for creating a grand reveal over your dining table or entryway. products.title: Claridge Lantern
products.description: Crystal Clear. The Claridge Collection: lead crystal with polished nickel accents and a gray cotton fabric shade.

products.title: Claridge Component Table Lamp
products.description: Crystal Clear. The Claridge Collection: lead crystal with polished nickel accents and a gray cotton fabric shade. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Ventana Two-Tier Chandelier
products.description: Refined Radiance. Our Ventana Two-Tier Chandelier is elegant and ladylike in ivory wood with polished nickel accents or timelessly handsome in ebonized wood with antiqued brass or polished nickel accents. Topped with natural linen shades. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Milano Kinetic Chandelier
products.description: Haute High Tech. Our architectural Milano Kinetic Chandelier wows with its balanced composition. Dynamic enough to catch your eye, but compactly stacked to keep it from overwhelming your space. Double down on industrial chic with a deep patina bronze finish, or turn up some extra twinkle with polished nickel or brass. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Totem Table Lamp
products.description: Chic Stack. Three blocks of black marble separated by two polished brass orbs to create a stacked pyramid silhouette. Gravity-defying modern glamour topped with an oyster linen shade. Singular on a side table or fabulous flanking your bed. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Meurice Task Floor Lamp
products.description: Global Appeal. Our modern take on classic bamboo. Our twist on the traditional, iconic world of bamboo adds a bit of socialite glamour to a loft or modernism to a Park Avenue Pad. The Meurice Task Floor Lamp is the perfect reading light next to a sofa or chair. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Rio Small Pendant
products.description: Well Rounded. Conjure mid-century modernism with a light that swings between industrial cool and vintage warmth. Laser-cut detailing accentuates the orb's elongated silhouette. Cluster three Rio Small Pendant Lights at different heights above a tailored sofa or generously sized cocktail table. All lighting sales are final. Discover the entire Rio Collection

products.title: Rio Pendant
products.description: Well Rounded. Our Rio Pendants are perfect for transforming your space into a mid-century lounge. The elongated silhouette resembles a droplet of water—the curved shade features laser-cut detailing for added architectural chic. Cluster three at different heights above a tailored sofa or generously sized cocktail table. All lighting sales are final. Discover the entire Rio Collection

products.title: Rio Multi-Arm Chandelier
products.description: Well Rounded. Our Rio Multi-Arm Chandelier is a modern take on mid-century glass globe lighting, accented with a decorative cut-out motif. It's perfect for adding drama to a double-height foyer. Choose from three finishes: a deep patina bronze for industrial chic, polished nickel for twinkly modernism, or antiqued brass for vintage warmth All lighting sales are final. products.title: Venezia Small Vase
products.description: Very Veneto. Inspired by handblown glass perfume bottles, our Venezia vases feature fantastical silhouettes made modern with bold cobalt accents. Available in three shapes and sizes, each crafted from matte white porcelain. Make a nouveau nautical statement with one or group all three for maximum glamour.

products.title: Venezia Large Vase
products.description: Very Veneto. Inspired by handblown glass perfume bottles, our Venezia vases feature fantastical silhouettes made modern with bold cobalt accents. Available in three shapes and sizes, each crafted from matte white porcelain. Make a nouveau nautical statement with one or group all three for maximum glamour.

products.title: Venezia Medium Vase
products.description: Very Veneto. Inspired by handblown glass perfume bottles, our Venezia vases feature fantastical silhouettes made modern with bold cobalt accents. Available in three shapes and sizes, each crafted from matte white porcelain. Make a nouveau nautical statement with one or group all three for maximum glamour.

products.title: Alphaville Table Lamp
products.description: Futuristic Reflection. An ultra modernist statement. Our Alphaville Table Lamp features a stacked capsule shaped milk glass shade with a smooth honed brass base and a triple stacked ring finial. Jewelry for your abode by day, a real glow-getter by night. Modernize your Park Avenue penthouse or add traditional elegance to your Tribeca loft. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Scala Rechargeable Table Lamp
products.description: Mod Bamboo. Our Scala Rechargeable LED Table Lamp features our twist on the traditional, iconic world of bamboo—a mod motif of poppy blue hues segmented by brass accents. Topped with a fluted milk glass shade. Touch control includes a dimmer function for achieving optimal ambience. Its rechargeable battery offers over nine hours of cordless illumination and, to recharge, simply pop it onto its cha

products.title: Ripple Adjustable Floor Lamp
products.description: Make Waves. Our Ripple lighting collection features articulating and adjustable styles with shades trimmed with our signature rippled edge. Our Ripple Adjustable Floor Lamp stem can be adjusted to different heights, and its base features a cuff and campaign corners. All lighting sales are final.

products.title: Globo Fretwork Sconce
products.description: Futuristic Fantasy. Welcome to our world of dreamy, high-voltage glamour. Jewel-toned acrylic and opaque white orbs float on modern brass fretwork—luxe and luminous in a small space, out of this world flanking an entry console. Our sculptural Globo lighting resuscitates conventional interiors and adds an ultra-glam polish to swanky spaces. All lighting sales are final.

White sand beach to infinity pool, they look as good draped across a chaise lounge as they do wrapped around your shoulders.

products.description: Modern Craft. products.title: Turtle Valet Tray
products.description: Shell Shock. Geometric patterns pop on a bold blue backdrop. Our Turtle tray reinvents the classic valet tray. It's perfect for corralling your keys on a console, watching over your nightstand, or giving you a glimpse on your vanity. Packaged in a nifty gift box, it makes a perfect hostess present (or pick-me-up for yourself).

products.title: Large Basketweave Lacquer Box
products.description: Modern Craft. Featuring a traditional basket weave pattern in cool blues with a lime green accent. Velvet lined and hand-polished to high-gloss perfection. A posh, preppy, and tidying addition to your shelf, mantel, or tablescape. Keep your possessions handy but hidden. Available in three sizes for stashing, stacking, or making a stand-alone statement.

products.title: Medium Basketweave Lacquer Box

products.title: Druggist Backgammon Set
products.description: Dream Catcher. Expand your horizons on game night. Crafted in couture lacquer, the high-gloss box features our signature Delft-inspired blues. It opens to reveal a graphic interior accented with dreamy third-eye mindscapes. After vanquishing your foes, fold it closed for use as a surreal cocktail table topper.

products.title: Belvedere Sconce
products.description: Crystal Ball. The ultimate jewel for your walls—a luminous, gem-toned crystal ball on a warm brass backplate. Topped with a brass ball trimmed lined shade. products.title: Full Dose Tic-Tac-Toe Set
products.description: Pop (Art) Pills. Modern art or old school challenge? Both. An update on a favorite parlor pastime, our Full Dose Tic-Tac-Toe Set features perfectly polished opaque navy and blue playing pieces on a scored slab of white acrylic. A perfect housewarming present, gift for a playful host, or addition to your own game night. When not in play it's a poppy topper for your cocktail table or shelf.

products.title: Marais Lounge Chair
products.description: Haute Hoof. Marais is the perfect pop of black and white—familiar but fresh, chic and graphique . Featuring a classic capsule silhouette with an intriguingly sculptural split upholstered in two-toned bouclé. Think cozy lounge chair, but also think objet d’art . Modish in a Brooklyn Brownstone parlor, fierce in a fab fashionista’s boudoir.

products.title: Como Accent Table

products.title: Bond Cocktail Table
products.description: Timelessly Chic. Architectural rigor meets the warmth of burled wood in our Bond collection. Pieced mappa wood floats atop a simple but glamorous X-shaped acrylic base. At 40" x 40", our Bond Cocktail Table is squarely large-and-in-charge. Pared down enough for a Tribeca loft, but luxe enough for a Park Avenue penthouse.

products.title: Bond Desk
products.description: Timelessly Chic. Architectural rigor meets the warmth of burled wood in our Bond collection. Pieced mappa wood floats between clear acrylic legs with shiny stainless steel accents. Fully finished drawers with hidden pulls create a clean silhouette that's fierce from any angle. Work its minimalist magic as a small desk or stylish console. Form plus function equals fabulously cool.

Cluster a few on your counter, keep one bedside for late-night cravings, or go wild and collect them all.
